name: google-drive-compressor
description: Google Drive video compression and management system

scripts.dev:tray: wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && pnpm --filter @gdrive-compressor/desktop exec electron .
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n api,web,desk -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm dev:api" "pnpm dev:web" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:3001 tcp:127.0.0.1:3000 && pnpm --filter @gdrive-compressor/desktop exec electron ."
scripts.build:desktop:bundle: pnpm --filter @gdrive-compressor/api build && pnpm --filter @gdrive-compressor/web build && pnpm --filter @gdrive-compressor/desktop bundle:app
